titleStmt.title: SII 34.274: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 274. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the east wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: The trustees of the temple received an endowment of 34 paṇam from Aḻagaṉ Kaliyugameyyaṉ alias Kalikaḍinda-Pāṇḍyadēva of Viḷattūr in Miḻalai-kūṟṟam for the maintenance of the gardeners engaged for growing cheṅgaḻunīr (red lily) flowers.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulaicEkara tEvark
kuyāṇṭu 10 1 vatu miḻalaik kūṟṟattu viḷattūr
Uṭaiyāṉ Aḻakaṉ kaliyukameyyaṉāṉa kalikaṭi
nta pāṇṭiya tēvarkku Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉ kuḷamuṭaiya
nāyaṉār kōyilil tāṉattōm piramāṇam paṇ
ṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvāṇṭu paṅkuṉimātamutal
Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉ kuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Ivar taṉma mā
ka ceykiṟa tiruc ceṅkaḻunīrōṭaikku niṟkiṟa pūtto
ṇṭarkku nitta nimantattukku Ubhayamāka tiruppaṇi
kku tirunāḷaḻivukku Ivar cīpaṇṭārattil Oṭukkiṉa 1 mā-3 10 4 Inta
paṇam muppattunālum cipaṇṭārattilē Oṭukkikoṇ
ṭu pūttoṇṭarkku paṭikku nāyaṉārkku Amutupaṭikku Aḷa
kkumariciyōṭē kūṭa cīpaṇṭārattilē Irunāḻi Ariciyē
ṟṟa palakaippuṟattē Aḷantu piḷḷaiyār nāyaṉāramu
tuceytu koṟṟaṭaippupeṟavum Iṉṉāḷ mutal nāḷo
ṉṟukku paṭikkālāl tūṇi nellum Inta nimantam cantirātittava
rai cella ceyvippōmāka Ippaṭi cammatittu piramāṇam paṇ
ṇikkuṭuttōm kalikaṭinta pāṇṭiyat tēvarkku Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉ kuḷamuṭai
ya nāyaṉār kōyil tāṉattōm
Digital edition of SII 34.274 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
